pi_items.source: Task and environment setup scripts show the dataset is downloaded from Rdatasets and saved to this exact path.
Task description requests saving the project to this path.
Task description requests saving the textual results to this path.
setup_task.sh creates this file with the precomputed ground truth statistics.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset used is the real BFI dataset from the psych R package, containing participants' personality item ratings and gender. The dataset is generated during setup as BFI25.csv with complete rows only. The task involves reverse coding item A1 and taking the mean of A1-A5 to compute an Agreeableness score. An independent samples t-test comparing this score between genders yields expected means of roughly 4.376 (Male) and 4.776 (Female), and a t-statistic around -10.39 (Student's) or -10.09 (Welch's). Both result in a p-value < .001. The verifier uses precomputed ground truth values to dynamically score the agent's output.
